project.name: Payment Rails Service
project.description: Multi-rail payment routing and settlement: selects the optimal clearing rail (SWIFT, SEPA / SEPA Instant, ACH, FedWire, UPI, Pix, M-Pesa, SPEI, PayNow, FPS) for an outbound payment by currency/country/amount/urgency, submits via a pluggable rail provider, and tracks settlement — emitting paymentrails.payment.settled for the ledger and settlement services.
